date_precision.description: v0.7.14 (Round 11): explicit precision marker so synthetic-Jan-1 / synthetic-day-1 dates can no longer pose as full ISO calendar dates. When omitted (default 'day'), the `date` field is interpreted as exact. Set 'year' for events whose precise day/month is not in the public record (Masser-Oesterle 1985, Frobenioids I 2008, Etale Theta 2009 — all -01-01 padded), 'month' for events known to month precision but day unknown.

url.description: Source URL for the event (kurims news entry, arXiv abstract page, conference program page, etc.) — added at v0.5.2 to prevent fabrication-class drift surfaced by round-6 audit. v0.7.13: format=uri + http(s) pattern enforce non-injectable scheme (closes Round 10 critic CRITICAL: javascript:/data:/file: were silently accepted).

archive_url.description: Wayback Machine (or other archival) snapshot URL for the primary `url`. Particularly important for events pinned to volatile index pages such as `kurims.kyoto-u.ac.jp/~motizuki/news-english.html` whose entries rotate over time. v0.7.14 (Round 11): http(s) pattern parity with `url`.
